title: Tenants' Priority Scheme (TPS)
text:
Tenants' Priority Scheme (TPS) - SupportGoWhere
Tenants' Priority Scheme (TPS)
Share link
Allocates up to 10% of Flexi / Build-To-Order (BTO) / Sale of Balance (SBF) flats for eligible HDB rental flat tenants to help them purchase a home.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to 10% of 2-room Flexi and 3-room BTO / SBF flats reserved for eligible tenants
Collapse all sections
About this support

Up to 10% of 2-room Flexi and 3-room BTO or SBF flats are allocated to eligible applicants.

Who is this for?

You and your family have been living in a HDB public rental flat for at least 2 years.

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria during your HFE letter application, you may apply for this scheme in your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
